criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on app stores (Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads on app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for personalized recommendations, search, and other features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, reviews, and developer websites

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app interface.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and relevance of features offered by the app.

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: Frequency of app updates and improvements.

criteria.name: Security
criteria.description: Level of security and data protection offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, security audits
